nasb.text: So He brought them to His holy land, To this hill country which His right hand had gained.

esv.text: And he brought them to his holy land, to the mountain which his right hand had won.

cnv.text: 他領他們進入自己聖地的境界， 到他右手所得的這山地。

ccb.text: 祂带领自己的子民来到圣地的边界， 来到祂亲手为他们预备的山区，

csbs.text: 他带他们来到他圣地的边界， 到他右手所得的那座山。
